---
title: "Website Test"
---

::: {style="float: left; margin: 5px;"}
![](imgs/rosenbrock.png)
:::

This is a test site to test the viability of using quarto.

## Introductory Pathway 
Workshop schedule 2026

## Intermediate Pathway
Workshop schedule 2026

## Advanced Pathway
Workshop schedule 2026
### Project 1
